summary_text: **Incident trace (2026-04-04 JST)** - Local queue right before run had the target post `3316b8c0f0ac8195ac52c784e3dae979` as `approved` with thumbnail flags passing (`thumbnail_image_present=true`, `thumbnail_qa_verified=true`, `thumbnail_bytes=293773`) in [post_queue.json.bak-20260404-bulk-noncommercial-fix](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json.bak-20260404-bulk-noncommercial-fix#L42). - Scheduler cycle at `11:50` loaded Notion SoT, then at `11:51:02` failed pre-post validation: `thumbnail image presence not verified` in [scheduler.log](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/logs/scheduler.log#L22751) and [scheduler.log](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/logs/scheduler.log#L22796). - Current queue shows same post as `failed` with thumbnail flags reset to false/0 in [post_queue.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json#L22). **Findings (severity-ranked)** - **High**: `approved/scheduled` is not “scheduler-ready.” Due selection uses status/time only, then thumbnail gate runs at execution time and can hard-fail the post. See [_find_due_post](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L188) and runtime fail path [_validate_pre_post + fail transition](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L497). - Proposed fix: add a pre-approval invariant (or scheduler-ready state) so posts cannot be `approved` unless thumbnail gates pass; enforce on all status transitions. - **High**: Notion-first load overwrites local thumbnail QA state. Scheduler supplements only `image_path`/`reply_url`, not thumbnail flags; Notion values (default false/0 when absent) replace local fixes. See [scheduler SoT merge](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L399) and [post_generator Notion-first merge](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_generator.py#L274). - Proposed fix: either (1) preserve local thumbnail fields when Notion is empty/zero, or (2) make thumbnail fields authoritative in Notion and block scheduling until synced. - **Medium**: Local thumbnail fixes are not pushed back to Notion in routine sync; only dirty `status/scheduled_for/force_post` are pushed. See [push_updates_to_notion policy](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L546) and [dirty field builder](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L368). - Proposed fix: add dirty tracking + push for thumbnail QA fields (or run explicit sync step before approval). Existing explicit sync path is [sync_post_image.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/sync_post_image.py#L62). - **Medium**: Auto-approve can mark posts `approved` without any thumbnail QA checks and without Notion status sync markers. See [auto_generator auto-approve](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py#L506). - Proposed fix: remove direct `approved` assignment from generator, or gate it through the same scheduler-ready validator used by manual apply flow. - **Medium**: Worker path does not enforce thumbnail QA parity with scheduler; media upload failure is non-blocking and posting continues text-only. See [worker posting path](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/worker/src/index.ts#L85). - Proposed fix: unify a shared readiness check across Python scheduler and Worker, or clearly partition responsibilities to avoid contradictory behavior. **Test gaps** - Existing tests cover `_validate_pre_post` thumbnail gates, but there is no regression test for “local thumbnail-ready -> Notion reload downgrades flags -> due post fails at runtime.” Relevant existing coverage: [test_scheduler_gate1.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py#L207), [test_scheduler_r11_r12.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L442). - Add a cross-source merge/scheduling test reproducing this exact downgrade path.
